meaning: n.(=Laotian)老挝人,老挝语adj.(=Laotian)老挝人的
examples: Lao Wang, you are really terrific!
His Chinese friends call him "Lao Pan".
The play Teahouse was written by the famous Chinese writer Lao She.
And the relaxed attitude of the Lao people in general should help mitigate development greed.
Nature, which the Lao government has been careful to protect, seems to be enough on its own.
